title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The email from the login request is interpolated directly into the raw SQL query without parameterization.
coverage_items: Idle--loginRequest[email is used in routes/login.ts]/email is interpolated into raw SQL-->EmailInterpolated

title: EP - Email with SQL injection payload
test_steps: Send POST request to /login with SQL injection payload in email field
expected_result: Server returns SQL error or unexpected behavior indicating injection

title: DT - Verify email is interpolated without parameterization
test_steps: Send POST request to /login with email containing a single quote
expected_result: Server returns SQL syntax error, confirming interpolation
